notes: Spec asserts: (1) Session appears in ready within 1s of agent launch and (2) PID bound within 1s. Both phases anchor to recording start (agent launch) and budget 1000ms. Pi creates one .jsonl per session under ~/.pi/agent/sessions/<cwd-slug>/<ts>_<UUID>.jsonl as soon as the agent starts; transcript_new + state_transition→ready both land inside the daemon's first scanner tick. The proc-<PID> pre-session row bridges the brief gap until the transcript file appears.

text: Session appears in ready within 1s of agent launch
